title: Explain a concept simply
text: Explain @TOPIC@ as if you were teaching a curious 12-year-old. Use one short analogy, then list the three things people most often get wrong about it.

title: Pros and cons table
text: Give me a markdown table comparing the pros and cons of @OPTION_A@ versus @OPTION_B@. Five rows. End with a one-sentence recommendation noting which trade-off matters most.

title: Code review
text:
Review the following code for correctness, security, and clarity. Quote each issue with a line range, explain why it matters, and suggest the smallest change that fixes it. End with a one-paragraph overall verdict.

```
@CODE@
```

title: Summarise long text
text:
Summarise the text below in three layers: a one-sentence headline, a 100-word abstract, and a five-bullet executive summary. Preserve any numbers and proper nouns verbatim.

@TEXT@

title: Brainstorm alternatives
text: I'm currently planning to @PLAN@. Brainstorm five alternative approaches I haven't considered. For each: a one-line description, the strongest argument for, and the strongest argument against.
